message:
🐛 fix tile grid sizing - cells not constrained to equal widths (#61)

- Use minmax(0, 1fr) instead of 1fr for grid columns/rows to prevent
  xterm content from expanding cells beyond their fair share
- Add minWidth: 0 to grid container and cells (CSS Grid items default
  to min-width: auto which prevents shrinking below content size)
- Add overflow: hidden and width: 100% to xterm containers
- Constrain .xterm-screen width to 100% to prevent canvas overflow

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
